testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //button[contains(.,'In')]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //p[contains(@class,'toast-message')]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
